# Evidence Adapter Request

## Tool Or Evidence Source

Name the tool and artifact type, such as SARIF, JUnit, SBOM, Terraform plan, or approval record.

## Evidence State Needed

Which state should CertaMerge derive?

- [ ] present
- [ ] missing
- [ ] unavailable
- [ ] stale
- [ ] malformed
- [ ] failed
- [ ] negative
- [ ] insufficient
- [ ] conflicting

## Why This Matters

Explain the policy or proof gap this adapter would close.

## Data Safety

Do not attach real customer artifacts unless they are sanitized and safe to publish.
